creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:
I understand that base is all about removing stuff rather than adding - but I do have to ask how great of an idea it is to have llvm6 in the base and then need another version of llvm6 in ports....

Unless, of course, you define llvm in base as the least amount of compiler needed to compile base.

I compile everything in poudriere, so other than the hours to compile llvm6 that hold up my build I don't really have a problem with that.
